description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find a black-and-white cityscape print that qualifies for free standard shipping and costs under $60, then select its largest available size, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.
tasks.name: Find a black-and-white cityscape print that qualifies for free standard shipping and costs under $60, then select its largest available size, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.
tasks.description: Find a black-and-white cityscape print that qualifies for free standard shipping and costs under $60, then select its largest available size, set quantity to 2, and add it to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Add one landscape, one abstract, and one portrait print in medium size to your cart, choosing options so that each falls within its specified price range ($30–$40 landscape, $20–$35 abstract, $25–$40 portrait) and the combined total stays under $120.
tasks.name: Add one landscape, one abstract, and one portrait print in medium size to your cart, choosing options so that each falls within its specified price range ($30–$40 landscape, $20–$35 abstract, $25–$40 portrait) and the combined total stays under $120.
tasks.description: Add one landscape, one abstract, and one portrait print in medium size to your cart, choosing options so that each falls within its specified price range ($30–$40 landscape, $20–$35 abstract, $25–$40 portrait) and the combined total stays under $120.

tasks.instruction: Open the custom commissions form and submit a pet portrait request, providing your contact details, choosing a large size option, setting a clear budget, selecting a deadline about two months from today, and writing a detailed multi-sentence description of the project.
tasks.name: Open the custom commissions form and submit a pet portrait request, providing your contact details, choosing a large size option, setting a clear budget, selecting a deadline about two months from today, and writing a detailed multi-sentence description of the project.
tasks.description: Open the custom commissions form and submit a pet portrait request, providing your contact details, choosing a large size option, setting a clear budget, selecting a deadline about two months from today, and writing a detailed multi-sentence description of the project.

tasks.instruction: Register a new customer account on the site, then add a shipping address to the account and set it as the default shipping address.
tasks.name: Register a new customer account on the site, then add a shipping address to the account and set it as the default shipping address.
tasks.description: Register a new customer account on the site, then add a shipping address to the account and set it as the default shipping address.

tasks.instruction: In the portfolio or gallery, filter to the night-city collection, sort its artworks by oldest first, add the oldest piece to your favorites, then reopen it from your favorites page and scroll through all of its details.
tasks.name: In the portfolio or gallery, filter to the night-city collection, sort its artworks by oldest first, add the oldest piece to your favorites, then reopen it from your favorites page and scroll through all of its details.
tasks.description: In the portfolio or gallery, filter to the night-city collection, sort its artworks by oldest first, add the oldest piece to your favorites, then reopen it from your favorites page and scroll through all of its details.

tasks.instruction: Find any landscape print that offers both framed and canvas formats at size 16 x 20 in, compare the prices for that size, and add one copy of the cheaper format to your cart.
tasks.name: Find any landscape print that offers both framed and canvas formats at size 16 x 20 in, compare the prices for that size, and add one copy of the cheaper format to your cart.
tasks.description: Find any landscape print that offers both framed and canvas formats at size 16 x 20 in, compare the prices for that size, and add one copy of the cheaper format to your cart.

tasks.instruction: Using the existing cart contents, proceed through checkout as a guest with a sample US shipping address, then on the shipping step choose the fastest delivery option that costs less than $25 and continue to the payment screen without entering any card details.
tasks.name: Using the existing cart contents, proceed through checkout as a guest with a sample US shipping address, then on the shipping step choose the fastest delivery option that costs less than $25 and continue to the payment screen without entering any card details.

tasks.instruction: Use the footer form to subscribe to the site newsletter with a test email address, then go to the blog, filter posts to the 'Studio Process' category, open the newest post in that category, and scroll from the top to the bottom of the article.

target_names: Preparing Large Canvases for Urban Nights Cityscapes

tasks.instruction: In the shop, filter for floral or botanical prints with ratings of at least 4.5 stars, at least 10 reviews, and prices under $80, then choose the top result, select its largest available size, and add one copy to your cart.
